prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约6240→7784→9244→10891→10278名，整体呈持续后移趋势，2021–2024年累计后移约4651名；2025年较2024年小幅前移约613名 ，出现企稳回升信号，2025年基准约10278名；本省物理类计划2021年76人、2022年77人、2023年79人、2024年80人、2025年78人，2026年计划64人，较2 025年减少14人，缩招约17.95%，为近六年最大幅度缩减，竞争压力显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年稳定在40–4 3名区间，学校层次稳固，在交通运输、信息通信领域具有突出行业地位；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（历史实验室爆炸火灾事故），但该事件为较早历史事件， 对当前报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），综合热度约93.5万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平，未见明显负面舆情扩散；系统科学A+（全 国顶尖）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A类学科，学科实力在211高校中位居前列，对工科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业均为高热推荐，与北交大优势学科高度匹配，利好报考热度；辽宁省2026年考生总数约20万人 ，按2025年物理类占比约71.8%估算，物理类考生约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平；北京交通大学位于北京，对辽 宁考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在辽宁招生占比约2.5%–3.5%，属中等水平招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已出现企稳回升、2026年大幅缩招约18%导致竞争加剧、 学校学科实力强劲且专业热度匹配等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年10278名基础上进一步前移；预测最低位次约9121名，区间8621–9621名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、物联网工程、信息安全等）
- 理科试验班类（詹天佑试点班信息类/智能类）
- 电子信息类（通信工程、电子科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（轨道交通信号与控制、自动化、机器人工程等）
- 交通运输类（铁道运输、城市轨道交通、交通工程等）
- 理科试验班（信息与计算科学、统计学、应用物理学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济管理试验班（经济学、金融学、物流管理、信息管理与信息系统）
- 机器人工程（知行创新班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（8621–9621名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<8621名）可重点冲击詹天佑试点班和计算机类等王 牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>9621名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入北交大平台后再通过转专业或辅修调整方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6240 → 7784 → 9244 → 10891 → 10278, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4651 positions from 2021 to 2024; in 2025, there was a slight forward shift of about 613 positions compared to 2024, indicating a sign of stabilization and recovery, with the 2025 baseline at about 10278 positions; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 76 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 78 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 64, a decrease of 14 from 2025, a reduction of about 17.95%, the largest reduction in the past six years, significantly intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 41st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 40–43 range in recent years, with a solid university level and prominent industry status in transportation, information, and communication fields; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (historical laboratory explosion and fire accident), but this event is relatively early in history and has limited impact on current application psychology; Douyin popularity ranked 45th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 935,000, short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, with no obvious negative public opinion spread; System Science A+ (top in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A-class disciplines, with disciplinary strength ranking among the top in 211 universities, strongly attractive to engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are all highly recommended hot majors, highly matching the advantageous disciplines of Beijing Jiaotong University, benefiting application popularity; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is about 200,000, with the Physics Category proportion estimated at about 71.8% based on 2025 data, resulting in about 143,600 Physics Category candidates, roughly the same as 2025; Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Liaoning candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2.5%–3.5%, making it a medium-level enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization and recovery of the 2025 ranking, the significant enrollment reduction of about 18% in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the university's strong disciplinary strength and matching major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further move forward from the 2025 baseline of 10278; the predicted minimum ranking is about 9121, with a range of 8621–9621.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Information/Intelligence)
- Electronic Information (Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (Rail Transit Signal and Control, Automation, Robotics Engineering, etc.)
- Transportation (Railway Transportation, Urban Rail Transit, Traffic Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Applied Physics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Economics, Finance, Logistics Management, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Robotics Engineering (Zhixing Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (8621–9621), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<8621), you can focus on aiming for the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and top majors like Computer Science; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>9621), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, and then adjust through major transfer or minor programs after entering Beijing Jiaotong University.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 845 → 1604 → 1579 → 1960 → 1154, showing significant fluctuations; overall, rankings shifted backward from 2021 to 2024, but in 2025, they moved substantially forward by about 806 places compared to 2024, returning to near the 2021 level, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 1154. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 9 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 17, an increase of 4 from 2025, representing an expansion of about 30.77%, the largest expansion in the past six years, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 41st in the Soft Science Ranking, with a solid institutional level. However, Beijing Jiaotong University is known for its engineering strengths, making it less attractive to History Category candidates compared to Science Category candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to a laboratory accident), but this incident is not directly related to History Category admissions. It ranks 45th in Douyin popularity (relatively popular), with overall popularity moderately high. Beijing Jiaotong University's A-level disciplines are all in engineering/science fields, and the History Category admission majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Liberal Arts Experimental Class, etc.) have low relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines, providing limited support from discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the Law major is divided and uncertain (both recommended and discouraged), while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; overall, liberal arts majors are relatively unpopular. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province is about 56,400, roughly the same as in 2025. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which still holds some regional appeal for Liaoning History Category candidates, but less so than for Science Category candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the approximately 31% expansion in 2026 easing competition, and the low match between the university's engineering focus and History Category majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1154. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1397, with a range of 1146–1648.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economic Management Talent Pilot Class) (Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Network and New Media (Outstanding Talent Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marxist Theory (Humanities and Social Sciences Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (1146–1648), with only 4 History Category majors available, it is recommended to prioritize Law and the Liberal Arts Experimental Class as main choices. For rankings significantly above the upper limit (<1146), focus on aiming for Law. For rankings near the lower limit (>1648), consider Network and New Media or Marxist Theory as safety options.
